name: Coq Au Vin (Chicken Braised in Red Wine)
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the chicken in the butter in a frying pan over moderate heat.
2. Place the chicken in a heavy casserole.
3. Brown the onions and bacon in the frying pan and add to the chicken.
4. Remove all but 2 tablespoons from the pan.
5. Add the flour and stir well.
6. Add stock, bouquet garni, wine, salt, and pepper. Stir and pour over the chicken.
7. Cover and simmer for 30 minutes.
8. Add the red wine vinegar. Degrease the sauce before serving.
